title: Fix protocol plan-example validation gap

do_not_read: other directories in ~/dev unless explicitly referenced

scope: Resolve only the blocking MVP-011 finding that exact protocol examples embedded in the MVP plan do not validate against the implemented protocol/schema.
goals: Use the tdd skill if changing code or tests.

Make the exact JSON examples at reports/autocomplete-engine-mvp-plan-2026-05-28.json protocol.autocomplete_request_example, protocol.autocomplete_response_example, and protocol.error_response_example validate through AutocompleteRequest/AutocompleteResponse deserialization, generated JSON Schema, and semantic Validate.
Prefer updating the plan examples to include protocol_version: 1 and valid UUID request_id values matching the v1 fixtures over weakening the required versioned protocol contract.
Add or extend a protocol regression test/check so cargo test fails if those embedded plan examples drift out of validity again.
Preserve the Rust protocol crate boundaries: no HTTP server, provider, VS Code client, or Obsidian client work in this task.
non_goals: Do not implement server, provider, postprocessing, VS Code, or Obsidian functionality.
Do not relax protocol_version requirements unless an explicit design decision is recorded and independently verified.
Do not modify unrelated orchestration files or pre-existing dirty worktree changes.
safety: Do not edit files tagged human-written unless explicitly authorized by the user.
success_criteria: A checker equivalent to MVP-011's temporary plan-example checker reports schema_valid=true, deserialize=ok, and semantic_valid=true for the request, ok response, and error response examples embedded in the MVP plan.

Write a handoff to reports/orchestration/mvp-2026-05-28/handoffs/MVP-012-fix-protocol-plan-examples.json summarizing files changed, tests run, and whether MVP-011 can now be considered passable after independent recheck.
